sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82235" key="peri/steptos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περίστεπτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n82235.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">crowned, wreathed</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ταινίαις</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:112:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">112.6</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
